creator: areilly@bigpond.net.au
text:
run epiphany (up-to-date, built from ports)
	go to www.smh.com.au
	see page mostly display properly then disappear
	inspect stderr on console:
	ASSERTION FAILED: inputElement->isChecked()
	(WebCore/dom/CheckedRadioButtons.cpp:78 void
	WebCore::CheckedRadioButtons::removeButton(WebCore::HTMLFormControlElement*))

	Since the error message is talking about GUI elements
	(radio buttons) I should mention that I'm running an
	up-to-date GNOME system, built from source from ports.

Fix: 

Work-around is to view that page with firefox3.
How-To-Repeat: 	Works every time for me.  Open www.smh.com.au as described above.
